title: Dotted Rhythms
description: Learn how the dot alters a note's length. Focus on dotted half notes and the dotted-quarter/eighth pair.

sessions.title: Adding Half Again
sessions.description: Learn the mathematical rule of the dotted rhythm.
sessions.prompt: Explain how a dot adds half of the original note's value to its total duration. Let's start with the Dotted Half Note in 3/4 and 4/4 time. Provide a reading exercise highlighting dotted half notes.

sessions.title: The Gallop
sessions.description: Master the dotted-quarter followed by an eighth note figure.
sessions.prompt: Teach the common dotted-quarter / eighth note rhythm pair. It takes up exactly two beats. Provide an exercise mixing this figure with standard quarter notes in 4/4 time to practice the syncopated feel.

levels.criteria: Can accurately perform syncopated and dotted rhythmic figures.
